name: Live Jazz Every Night
description: Seven nights a week on the Las Olas sidewalk patio. Real jazz, cold drinks, and the warm South Florida night.

name: Vinyl Night
description: DJs spinning vinyl in the Stache back room. No playlists, no algorithms — just records and good ears.

name: Live Music Friday
description: Live acts in the Stache den every Friday. Jazz, soul, funk — whoever they booked, it's worth showing up for.

name: Live Music Saturday
description: Saturday night at Stache hits different. The band is tight, the cocktails are strong, and the crowd knows what they came for.

name: Sunday Brunch on the Water
description: Bottomless mimosas, live acoustic music, and a view of the Intracoastal that makes every Sunday feel like a vacation day.

name: Live Music on the Dock
description: Bands play dockside while boats drift past on the Intracoastal. The kind of Friday night South Florida was made for.

name: Live Music Saturday
description: Saturday live music on the water. Cold drink in hand, music in the air, Intracoastal views. Hard to beat.

name: Happy Hour
description: Half-price drinks and appetizers from 4–8 PM. Blue Martini's happy hour is one of the best deals in Broward County.

name: Live Music Friday
description: Live band Friday night at Blue Martini. The dance floor warms up early and stays packed until last call.

name: Live Music Saturday
description: Saturday night live at Blue Martini. Get there before 10 if you want a seat.

name: Trivia Night
description: Weekly trivia in the Arts District backyard. Great teams, cold craft beer, and questions that actually make you think.

name: Live Music Thursday
description: Local artists on the Wilder stage every Thursday. Discover the next big name before everyone else does.

name: Sunday Brunch
description: A beloved Sunday ritual in downtown Fort Lauderdale. Bottomless drinks, a waterside patio, and all-day energy that somehow stays chill.

name: Trivia Night
description: Wednesday trivia at Tarpon Bend. Good questions, better prizes, and that classic Fort Lauderdale dive-bar energy.

name: Live Music Weekend
description: Bokamper's fires up the patio stage on weekends with live bands. Cold beer, good wings, and a crowd that's there to have a great time.

name: Happy Hour on Las Olas
description: Half-price drinks and margarita specials from 4–7 PM. Rocco's Las Olas happy hour is a South Florida institution.
